title: Bharat Value Fund Series VI (Fund Of Fund) — Sales Pitch (English)
content:
Headline: India's Fastest-Growing Pre-IPO Value Fund — 2.8x MOIC in 24 Months, Now Open for Series VI at the Inflection Point

Elevator: Bharat Value Fund Series VI is a Category II AIF deploying a battle-tested dual-pillar strategy: 70–80% in high-conviction unlisted pre-IPO companies where we take board seats and drive margin expansion, plus up to 30% in liquid listed anchors for de-risking. Series I delivered 2.8x MOIC in under 2 years with exits like Consumer Electricals at 8.6x in 17 months (300%+ IRR). Series II and III are tracking 1.5–1.6x within months of close. We invest at the inflection point — post-revenue, PAT-positive, promoter-backed businesses poised for IPO — and exit as public markets reprice the growth we engineered.

Ideal Client: HNI/UHNI or family office with INR 1–10 crore deployment capacity, 5+ year horizon, appetite for structured illiquidity in exchange for pre-IPO re-rating alpha, and comfort with actively governed unlisted equity.
